_schema._comment: v0.2 Phase 1 Step 1 — artists.json scaffold (empty array). Per kunder/ink-and-art-cph/v02-DESIGN-SPEC.md §1 dispatch step 1: 'artists.json scaffold (tom array, dokumenteret schema) — kan landes uden content'.
_schema._authority: src/_data/site.json is single-source-of-truth for site-meta; this file is single-source-of-truth for artist roster.
_schema._owner: Steven/Haruki edit only (per DESIGN-MANUAL §14.1 — Simone kan ikke ændre artists.json direkte; site.json er Simone-editable via GitHub web UI, artists.json kræver Steven/Haruki).

_fields.name: string — full display name
_fields.slug: string — URL-safe slug for /artists/<slug> hvis page-route adopted
_fields.stilTags: array<string> — fixed vocabulary: blackwork, fineline, traditional, neo-traditional, japanese, realism, dotwork, geometric, illustrative, lettering, cover-up, piercing-only
_fields.images: array<{src,alt,caption?}> — 3-5 portfolio-billeder, helst 1200px+ på lange led
_fields.bookingUrl: string optional — artist-specifik book.dk deeplink hvis support; ellers fallback til site.bookingUrl

_schema._consent: Per v02-DESIGN-SPEC §1 risk: artist-billeder med kunder synlige kræver samtykke. Default-policy: kun ren tattoo-close-ups uden ansigter (DESIGN-MANUAL §10 default-denied principle).
_schema._status: v0.2 PHASE 1 STEP 1 — schema låst, content awaits Simone leverance (estimat 30 min/artist, 1.5 time samlet for 3 artists).
